summary: Pre-Cuenta Security Fix VERIFIED - All backend tests passed (9/9). Frontend UI confirmed items show 'Enviado' status after Pre-Cuenta. The security fix ensures pending items are auto-sent to kitchen before printing pre-cuenta, preventing unauthorized deletion.
critical_code_review_comments: autoSendPendingItems() function (Lines 1252-1271) correctly uses ordersAPI.sendToKitchen() - same endpoint as ENVIAR button
handlePrintPreCheck() (Lines 1273-1296) calls autoSendPendingItems() BEFORE printing pre-cuenta
handlePrintAccountPreCheck() (Lines 1323-1337) includes security auto-send for specific account
handlePrintAllAccounts() (Lines 1340-1363) includes security auto-send for ALL accounts before printing
Backend send-kitchen endpoint (Lines 1090-1177 in orders.py) correctly changes item status from 'pending' to 'sent'
Express void correctly blocked for sent items (returns 400 error)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-Cuenta security fix verified. Key implementation: 1) autoSendPendingItems() calls ordersAPI.sendToKitchen() before printing, 2) Items change from 'pending' to 'sent' status, 3) Sent items require audit protocol (reason + optional manager auth) to delete - express void is blocked. Physical printers are MOCKED in preview environment.

autoSendPendingItems_function.description: Uses ordersAPI.sendToKitchen() - same endpoint as ENVIAR button

handlePrintAccountPreCheck_security.description: Auto-sends pending items for specific account

handlePrintAllAccounts_security.description: Auto-sends pending items for ALL accounts

send_kitchen_endpoint.description: Changes item status from 'pending' to 'sent', marks sent_to_kitchen=true

express_void_blocked_for_sent.description: Express void returns 400 error for sent items - requires audit protocol

enviar_button_unchanged.description: ENVIAR button still works independently using same endpoint

security_fix_verification.original_issue: Items in 'Pendiente' status could be deleted without authorization
fix_applied: Pre-Cuenta button now calls autoSendPendingItems() BEFORE printing
autoSendPendingItems() uses ordersAPI.sendToKitchen() - same as ENVIAR button
Items change from status='pending' to status='sent'
Sent items require audit protocol to delete (reason + optional manager auth)
security_fix_verification.verification_result: PASS - All 9 backend tests passed, UI shows 'Enviado' status

frontend_test_results.tables_view: WORKING - Shows MAPA DE MESAS with 10 tables
frontend_test_results.order_screen: WORKING - Shows categories, products, order items
frontend_test_results.item_status_display: WORKING - Shows 'Enviado' badge for sent items
frontend_test_results.pre_cuenta_button: WORKING - Triggers auto-send then shows pre-cuenta dialog
frontend_test_results.manager_auth_for_reprint: WORKING - Shows 'Autorización de Gerente' dialog for reprints

mocked_apis.Physical printers: Not available in preview environment - print queue logic works but actual printing cannot be tested
